title: Diessh
description: Resource pack for UHC, SMP, CPVP, Vanilla
body:
# Diessh
resource pack intended for PVP and competitive usage.
## Change list
Visible ores!

Shorter Tool & Weapon Viewmodels!

Colored Bow & Crossbow Stages!

Transparent Pumpkin & Fishing rod!

Better armor!

Better GUI & font!

Better Grass!

Low Fire!

...And more!
### Showcase
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4215b4bcf3b970138b7f91cda1299c4ee2a39d68.png)
## Issues
if you have any problems, write to me on Discord:rchz
